name: Checkbox
description: Salt Core Checkbox and CheckboxGroup components allow users to select or deselect one or more options from a set of independent choices.

Checkbox.description: A single checkbox option that can be selected or deselected.

props.checked: If true, the checkbox will be checked. Use for controlled components.
props.defaultChecked: Whether the checkbox is checked by default (uncontrolled). Disregarded if checked is already set.
props.disabled: If true, the checkbox will be disabled and not interactive.
props.indeterminate: If true, the checkbox appears indeterminate (neither selected nor deselected). Common use: parent checkbox in hierarchical groups.
props.label: ReactNode displayed next to the checkbox.
props.name: The name attribute applied to the input element.
props.value: The value of the checkbox (used in forms and CheckboxGroup).
props.readOnly: If true, the checkbox is read-only; user can read but not change state.
props.validationStatus: One of "error" | "warning" | "success". Checkbox has visual styling for error and warning.
props.onChange: Callback when checked state changes. Signature: (event: ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void
props.inputProps: Additional props to pass to the underlying input element; supports data attributes.
props.inputRef: Ref to access the hidden input element.

CheckboxGroup.description: A group of checkboxes allowing selection of multiple independent options.

props.checkedValues: Array of string values representing currently checked checkboxes (controlled component).
props.defaultCheckedValues: Array of string values for initially checked checkboxes (uncontrolled).
props.disabled: If true, all checkboxes in the group are disabled.
props.readOnly: If true, all checkboxes in the group are read-only.
props.name: The name attribute applied to each checkbox in the group.
props.wrap: For horizontal direction only. If true (default), text wraps; if false, checkboxes wrap to next line.
props.validationStatus: One of "error" | "warning" | "success". Applied to all checkboxes in group.
props.onChange: Callback fired when any checkbox is clicked. Signature: (event: ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void

accessibility.role: checkbox (for Checkbox), group (for CheckboxGroup when used semantically)
keyboard: Tab — Focus moves to the checkbox or first checkbox in group
Shift+Tab — Focus moves to previous element
Space — Toggles checked state of focused checkbox
Arrow keys — Within group, can move between checkboxes (Tab+Space pattern also supported)
aria: aria-label — Required if checkbox has no visible text label
aria-describedby — Can be used to describe the checkbox or group
aria-labelledby — Can be used to associate with a label element
aria-checked — Automatically managed; reflects checked/indeterminate/unchecked state

with: FormField — Wrap CheckboxGroup for label and validation messaging
StackLayout — Compose with descriptions or additional content in label prop
Text — For secondary labels or descriptions within CheckboxGroup
inside: FormField — CheckboxGroup can be child of FormField
FlexLayout, StackLayout — For responsive layout of grouped checkboxes
Dialog, Panel — Checkboxes can appear in modal sections
